source: 30 Ad Archetype Master — distilled for prompt use
note: Each archetype is a proven ad concept. Pick DISTINCT archetypes for a test pack so angles are genuinely diverse (not variations). Each should destroy a specific false belief. Use `hook` as the opening pattern and `arc` for the shot progression; all follow Triple Hook (Qualifier -> Main -> Twist) into a 5-part story (Hook, Background, Conflict, Resolution, CTA).

archetypes.name: Challenge Ad
archetypes.summary: Turn your claim into a timed test with real stakes and document the friction live — proof wrapped in suspense. People fall for the attempt, not the outcome.
archetypes.destroys: It won't work / it's too hard to do
archetypes.hook: I'm giving myself 72 hours to ___ — everyone says it can't work, so I'm about to find out.
archetypes.arc: Set rules + stakes -> mid-test friction/setbacks -> tease the result at the CTA (payoff comes AFTER the CTA).

archetypes.name: Tutorial Ad
archetypes.summary: Demonstrate your process in real time — turn curiosity into capability. It actually helps the viewer, which builds instant trust.
archetypes.destroys: It's too complicated / I couldn't do this myself
archetypes.hook: Here's exactly how to ___ in a few steps.
archetypes.arc: Promise a quick win -> step-by-step demo -> the result -> CTA to go deeper.

archetypes.name: Transformation Ad
archetypes.summary: An identity shift — show who the buyer becomes, not just the result. Before/after of the self.
archetypes.destroys: I'm not the type of person who succeeds at this
archetypes.hook: I used to be ___. Now I'm ___.
archetypes.arc: Old identity + pain -> the catalyst -> new identity/proof -> CTA.

archetypes.name: Revelation Ad
archetypes.summary: Deliver the 'I never saw it that way' moment — reframe something the audience thought they understood.
archetypes.destroys: A hidden assumption about how things work
archetypes.hook: What if everything you believe about ___ is backwards?
archetypes.arc: State the common view -> the reveal -> what it means for them -> CTA.

archetypes.name: Reversal Ad
archetypes.summary: Attack the thing 'everyone' believes and flip it on its head.
archetypes.destroys: The mainstream 'you need X' belief
archetypes.hook: Everyone says you have to ___. They're wrong — here's why.
archetypes.arc: Name the belief -> dismantle it -> offer the new rule -> CTA.

archetypes.name: Metaphor Ad
archetypes.summary: Turn an abstract idea into a tangible, visual experience — logic into emotion, teaching into entertainment.
archetypes.destroys: It's too complex/confusing to understand
archetypes.hook: ___ is just like ___.
archetypes.arc: Introduce a relatable metaphor -> map it onto the offer -> the aha -> CTA.

archetypes.name: A vs. B Alignment Ad
archetypes.summary: Force viewers to instantly pick a side — tribal resonance and identification over education.
archetypes.destroys: This isn't for people like me
archetypes.hook: There are two kinds of ___...
archetypes.arc: Contrast two camps -> invite the viewer to self-identify -> CTA for 'their' side.

archetypes.name: Without Ad
archetypes.summary: Flip what the audience thinks is required — you do NOT need the assumed prerequisite. A powerful myth-destroyer.
archetypes.destroys: You need X first (money / followers / experience)
archetypes.hook: You don't need ___ to ___.
archetypes.arc: Name the assumed requirement -> prove it's unnecessary -> show the real path -> CTA.

archetypes.name: Comparison Ad
archetypes.summary: Make the invisible difference visible — raw, side-by-side visual truth. Needs little storytelling.
archetypes.destroys: They're all the same / what I have is fine
archetypes.hook: This vs. that.
archetypes.arc: Show A beside B directly -> highlight the gap -> CTA.

archetypes.name: Testimonial Story Ad
archetypes.summary: Turn a customer's result into a relatable story, not a stat — the heartbeat of belief.
archetypes.destroys: It won't work for someone like me
archetypes.hook: [Name] was exactly where you are right now...
archetypes.arc: Their before -> struggle -> your solution -> their after -> CTA.

archetypes.name: Skit Ad
archetypes.summary: Disarm with humour — turn a daily frustration into an inside joke. Emotion in disguise.
archetypes.destroys: Skepticism / emotional resistance
archetypes.hook: A relatable, slightly absurd everyday scenario.
archetypes.arc: Exaggerate the pain comedically -> reveal the fix -> CTA.

archetypes.name: Myth Ad
archetypes.summary: Challenge something the audience believes is true but isn't — crush the lie and prove your worth fast.
archetypes.destroys: A widely believed external myth
archetypes.hook: The biggest lie you've been told about ___ is...
archetypes.arc: State the myth -> evidence against it -> the truth -> CTA.

archetypes.name: What No One Told Me Ad
archetypes.summary: Share a hard-earned lesson nobody warned you about — intimate truth marketing.
archetypes.destroys: This should be obvious / I should already know it
archetypes.hook: No one told me ___ until it was almost too late.
archetypes.arc: Naive past -> the painful lesson -> what you'd do differently -> CTA.

archetypes.name: Prediction Ad
archetypes.summary: Position yourself as the voice of foresight — where the niche is heading next.
archetypes.destroys: It's too late / the opportunity has passed
archetypes.hook: In 12 months, ___ is going to ___ — here's what to do now.
archetypes.arc: The trend -> the prediction -> the move to make today -> CTA.

archetypes.name: Philosophy / Movement Ad
archetypes.summary: Shift from marketer to mission leader — build culture around a belief.
archetypes.destroys: It's just another product
archetypes.hook: I believe ___ — and most of this industry is doing it wrong.
archetypes.arc: The belief -> why it matters -> the movement to join -> CTA.

archetypes.name: Regret Ad
archetypes.summary: Show the cost of inaction — the thing most brands avoid. Builds empathy and urgency at once.
archetypes.destroys: I'll get to it later
archetypes.hook: My biggest regret was waiting so long to ___.
archetypes.arc: The delay -> the cost it caused -> the turning point -> CTA.

archetypes.name: Data / Proof Ad
archetypes.summary: The conversion workhorse — use hard numbers to make the message bulletproof.
archetypes.destroys: An external belief, disproven with evidence
archetypes.hook: ___% of people who ___ end up ___.
archetypes.arc: Claim -> the data/proof -> what it means -> CTA.

archetypes.name: Contrarian Ad
archetypes.summary: Rebellion and revelation — flip the script and force people to think.
archetypes.destroys: The standard advice everyone repeats
archetypes.hook: Stop doing ___. Do the opposite.
archetypes.arc: Attack the norm -> your counter-method -> proof it works -> CTA.

archetypes.name: Guru Story Ad
archetypes.summary: A lesson from someone smarter that changed you — makes you human and real.
archetypes.destroys: Who are you to teach me this?
archetypes.hook: The best advice I ever got was from ___...
archetypes.arc: The mentor moment -> the lesson -> how it changed you -> CTA.

archetypes.name: Historical Story Ad
archetypes.summary: Connect your message to a moment everyone remembers — time teaches.
archetypes.destroys: Skepticism, softened by a shared reference
archetypes.hook: Remember when ___?
archetypes.arc: The shared past moment -> the parallel to now -> the lesson -> CTA.

archetypes.name: Plan B Story Ad
archetypes.summary: Pivoting under pressure — turn failure into fuel.
archetypes.destroys: If it fails, I'm finished
archetypes.hook: When ___ fell apart, I had to ___.
archetypes.arc: The collapse -> the pivot -> the comeback -> CTA.

archetypes.name: Morality Story Ad
archetypes.summary: Integrity in action — show the right choice made when the wrong one was easier. Authenticity converts.
archetypes.destroys: Everyone in this space is a scammer
archetypes.hook: I could have ___, but I ___.
archetypes.arc: The temptation -> the right choice -> the payoff of integrity -> CTA.

archetypes.name: Adventure Story Ad
archetypes.summary: Courage, risk, reward and transformation in motion — an emotional rollercoaster.
archetypes.destroys: I'm too comfortable / too scared to change
archetypes.hook: I risked ___ to ___.
archetypes.arc: The leap -> the ordeal -> the reward -> CTA.

archetypes.name: Transparency Ad
archetypes.summary: Replace claims with candor — destroy skepticism by showing the unflattering truth.
archetypes.destroys: This is too good to be true
archetypes.hook: Here's what they don't show you about ___...
archetypes.arc: The honest reality, flaws included -> why it still works -> CTA.

archetypes.name: Unique Mechanism Ad
archetypes.summary: Separate your product from every alternative (including free) — make the offer irreplaceable.
archetypes.destroys: I can get this elsewhere or for free
archetypes.hook: The reason ___ works when nothing else does is ___.
archetypes.arc: Name the mechanism -> why only you have it -> the result -> CTA.

archetypes.name: Status Quo Ad
archetypes.summary: Attack the belief no one ever questions — the belief breaker.
archetypes.destroys: A deeply held, unexamined assumption
archetypes.hook: Everyone assumes ___. What if that's the whole problem?
archetypes.arc: Expose the unquestioned assumption -> its hidden cost -> the alternative -> CTA.

archetypes.name: Common Enemy Ad
archetypes.summary: Unite the audience against a shared villain — an outdated method, a rigged system, a gatekeeper. Loyalty through shared frustration.
archetypes.destroys: The system is rigged against me
archetypes.hook: The real reason you're stuck isn't you — it's ___.
archetypes.arc: Name the villain -> rally against it -> reveal your side -> CTA.

archetypes.name: Aspirational Identity Ad
archetypes.summary: Show the future self the audience desperately wants to become — lifestyle, storytelling and emotion combined.
archetypes.destroys: That life isn't for someone like me
archetypes.hook: Show the desired identity/day-in-the-life onscreen.
archetypes.arc: The dream day-in-the-life -> the bridge (your offer) -> CTA.
